en.title: Find and Redact
en.metaDescription: Search and redact text across all pages of a PDF. Batch redact sensitive information like account numbers, names, and more.
en.description:
Find and Redact allows you to search for specific text, numbers, or patterns across all pages of your PDF and redact all matching occurrences at once. Perfect for removing sensitive information like account numbers, names, addresses, or any confidential data.

Preview all matches before applying redactions, and selectively choose which occurrences to redact. Supports case-sensitive search, whole word matching, and regular expressions for advanced pattern matching.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Search for Text
howToUse.description: Enter the text, number, or regex pattern you want to find and redact.

howToUse.title: Review and Select
howToUse.description: Preview all matches and select which ones to redact.

howToUse.title: Apply Redaction
howToUse.description: Customize redaction appearance and apply to selected matches.

useCases.title: Privacy Compliance
useCases.description: Redact personal information to comply with GDPR, HIPAA, or other regulations.

useCases.title: Legal Documents
useCases.description: Remove confidential data from legal documents before sharing.

useCases.title: Financial Records
useCases.description: Redact account numbers, SSNs, or financial data from statements.

faq.question: Is redaction permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, redaction permanently removes the underlying text. The original content cannot be recovered. Always keep a backup of the original file.

faq.question: Can I redact images or scanned text?
faq.answer: This tool works with text-based PDFs. For scanned documents, you would need to use manual area-based redaction.

faq.question: Can I customize the redaction appearance?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set the redaction color, add borders, and optionally include replacement text like "[REDACTED]".

faq.question: How does regex search work?
faq.answer: Enable "Use Regular Expression" to search using regex patterns. For example, \d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4} to find credit card numbers.

zh.title: 查找并遮盖
zh.metaDescription: 搜索并批量遮盖PDF中的敏感文本。支持正则表达式匹配账号、姓名等敏感信息。
zh.description:
查找并遮盖允许您在PDF的所有页面中搜索特定文本、数字或模式，并一次性遮盖所有匹配项。非常适合删除敏感信息，如账号、姓名、地址或任何机密数据。

在应用遮盖前预览所有匹配项，并选择性地选择要遮盖的出现次数。支持区分大小写搜索、全词匹配和正则表达式以进行高级模式匹配。

所有处理都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 搜索文本
howToUse.description: 输入要查找和遮盖的文本、数字或正则表达式模式。

howToUse.title: 审查并选择
howToUse.description: 预览所有匹配项并选择要遮盖的项目。

howToUse.title: 应用遮盖
howToUse.description: 自定义遮盖外观并应用于所选匹配项。

useCases.title: 隐私合规
useCases.description: 遮盖个人信息以符合GDPR、HIPAA或其他法规。

useCases.title: 法律文档
useCases.description: 在共享前从法律文档中删除机密数据。

useCases.title: 财务记录
useCases.description: 从报表中遮盖账号、社保号或财务数据。

faq.question: 遮盖是永久的吗？
faq.answer: 是的，遮盖会永久删除底层文本。原始内容无法恢复。请始终保留原始文件的备份。

faq.question: 可以遮盖图像或扫描文本吗？
faq.answer: 此工具适用于基于文本的PDF。对于扫描文档，您需要使用基于区域的手动遮盖。

faq.question: 可以自定义遮盖外观吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以设置遮盖颜色、添加边框，并可选择包含替换文本如"[已遮盖]"。

faq.question: 正则表达式搜索如何工作？
faq.answer: 启用"使用正则表达式"以使用正则模式搜索。例如，\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}可查找信用卡号。

en.title: PDF to Markdown
en.metaDescription: Convert PDF to Markdown format. Extract text and preserve formatting like headings and lists.
en.description:
PDF to Markdown converts your PDF documents into clean, well-structured Markdown files. The tool intelligently extracts text content and attempts to preserve formatting like headings, lists, and paragraphs.

Perfect for converting PDF documents to editable formats for documentation, note-taking, or content management systems that support Markdown.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Configure Options
howToUse.description: Set page range, choose to include page numbers, and adjust line break settings.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to generate your Markdown file and download.

useCases.title: Documentation
useCases.description: Convert PDF manuals and guides to Markdown for version-controlled documentation.

useCases.title: Note Taking
useCases.description: Extract content from PDF articles and books for your note-taking system.

useCases.title: Content Migration
useCases.description: Migrate PDF content to CMS platforms that support Markdown.

faq.question: Is formatting preserved?
faq.answer: The tool attempts to detect headings based on font size and bullet points/numbered lists. Complex layouts may require manual adjustment.

faq.question: Can I convert specific pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can specify a page range like "1-3, 5, 7" to convert only those pages.

faq.question: Does it work with scanned PDFs?
faq.answer: Scanned PDFs contain images, not text. Use our OCR tool first to extract text before converting to Markdown.

zh.title: PDF转Markdown
zh.metaDescription: 将PDF转换为Markdown格式。提取文本并保留标题和列表等格式。
zh.description:
PDF转Markdown将您的PDF文档转换为干净、结构良好的Markdown文件。该工具智能提取文本内容，并尝试保留标题、列表和段落等格式。

非常适合将PDF文档转换为可编辑格式，用于文档编写、笔记记录或支持Markdown的内容管理系统。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 配置选项
howToUse.description: 设置页面范围，选择是否包含页码，并调整换行设置。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 点击转换生成Markdown文件并下载。

useCases.title: 文档编写
useCases.description: 将PDF手册和指南转换为Markdown，用于版本控制的文档。

useCases.title: 笔记记录
useCases.description: 从PDF文章和书籍中提取内容到您的笔记系统。

useCases.title: 内容迁移
useCases.description: 将PDF内容迁移到支持Markdown的CMS平台。

faq.question: 格式会保留吗？
faq.answer: 该工具会根据字体大小检测标题，以及项目符号/编号列表。复杂布局可能需要手动调整。

faq.question: 可以转换特定页面吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以指定页面范围如"1-3, 5, 7"以仅转换这些页面。

faq.question: 扫描的PDF能用吗？
faq.answer: 扫描的PDF包含图像而非文本。请先使用我们的OCR工具提取文本，然后再转换为Markdown。

en.title: Digital Signature
en.metaDescription: Add X.509 digital signatures to PDF documents. Sign PDFs with PFX, P12, or PEM certificates for legal validity.
en.description:
Digital Signature allows you to add cryptographic X.509 digital signatures to PDF documents. Unlike simple drawn signatures, digital signatures provide legal validity and document integrity verification.

Upload your certificate file (PFX, P12, or PEM format), enter the password, and sign your PDF. You can add visible signatures with custom text, images, and positioning, or invisible signatures for document integrity only.

All signing happens locally in your browser. Your certificate and documents are never uploaded to any server.

howToUse.title: Upload PDF
howToUse.description: Upload the PDF document you want to digitally sign.

howToUse.title: Load Certificate
howToUse.description: Upload your X.509 certificate file (.pfx, .p12, or .pem) and enter the password.

howToUse.title: Configure Signature
howToUse.description: Optionally add reason, location, and visible signature with custom text or image.

howToUse.title: Sign and Download
howToUse.description: Click Sign PDF to apply the digital signature and download the signed document.

useCases.title: Legal Documents
useCases.description: Sign contracts, agreements, and legal documents with legally binding digital signatures.

useCases.title: Business Approvals
useCases.description: Digitally sign invoices, purchase orders, and approval documents for audit trails.

useCases.title: Document Integrity
useCases.description: Ensure documents have not been tampered with after signing.

faq.question: What certificate formats are supported?
faq.answer: PFX (.pfx), PKCS#12 (.p12), and PEM (.pem) certificate formats are supported.

faq.question: Is the signature legally valid?
faq.answer: Yes, X.509 digital signatures are legally recognized in most jurisdictions when using a valid certificate.

faq.question: Can I add a visible signature?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add a visible signature with custom text, image, position, and styling.

zh.title: 数字签名
zh.metaDescription: 为PDF文档添加X.509数字签名。使用PFX、P12或PEM证书签署PDF，具有法律效力。
zh.description:
数字签名工具允许您为PDF文档添加加密的X.509数字签名。与简单的手绘签名不同，数字签名提供法律效力和文档完整性验证。

上传您的证书文件（PFX、P12或PEM格式），输入密码，即可签署PDF。您可以添加带有自定义文本、图像和位置的可见签名，或仅用于文档完整性的不可见签名。

所有签名操作都在浏览器本地进行，您的证书和文档永远不会上传到任何服务器。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF
howToUse.description: 上传需要数字签名的PDF文档。

howToUse.title: 加载证书
howToUse.description: 上传X.509证书文件（.pfx、.p12或.pem）并输入密码。

howToUse.title: 配置签名
howToUse.description: 可选添加签名原因、位置，以及带有自定义文本或图像的可见签名。

howToUse.title: 签名并下载
howToUse.description: 点击签名PDF应用数字签名并下载签名后的文档。

useCases.title: 法律文件
useCases.description: 使用具有法律约束力的数字签名签署合同、协议和法律文件。

useCases.title: 商业审批
useCases.description: 数字签署发票、采购订单和审批文件以建立审计跟踪。

useCases.title: 文档完整性
useCases.description: 确保文档在签名后未被篡改。

faq.question: 支持哪些证书格式？
faq.answer: 支持PFX（.pfx）、PKCS#12（.p12）和PEM（.pem）证书格式。

faq.question: 签名具有法律效力吗？
faq.answer: 是的，使用有效证书的X.509数字签名在大多数司法管辖区具有法律认可。

faq.question: 可以添加可见签名吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以添加带有自定义文本、图像、位置和样式的可见签名。

en.title: Validate Signature
en.metaDescription: Verify digital signatures in PDF documents. Check certificate validity, signer information, and document integrity.
en.description:
Validate Signature allows you to verify digital signatures in PDF documents. Check if signatures are valid, view certificate information, and confirm document integrity.

Upload a signed PDF to see all signatures, their validity status, signer information, and whether the document has been modified after signing.

All validation happens locally in your browser. Your documents are never uploaded to any server.

howToUse.title: Upload Signed PDF
howToUse.description: Upload a PDF document that contains digital signatures.

howToUse.title: View Results
howToUse.description: See all signatures found in the document with their validity status.

howToUse.title: Check Details
howToUse.description: View certificate information, signer details, and signing timestamp.

howToUse.title: Export Report
howToUse.description: Optionally download a JSON report of the validation results.

useCases.title: Document Verification
useCases.description: Verify that signed documents are authentic and have not been tampered with.

useCases.title: Compliance Audit
useCases.description: Check signature validity for compliance and audit purposes.

useCases.title: Certificate Review
useCases.description: View certificate details and expiration dates for signed documents.

faq.question: What does "valid" mean?
faq.answer: A valid signature means the document has not been modified since signing and the certificate chain is intact.

faq.question: Can I validate multiple PDFs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload multiple PDFs and validate all signatures in batch.

faq.question: Why might a signature be invalid?
faq.answer: Signatures may be invalid if the document was modified, the certificate expired, or the certificate is not trusted.

zh.title: 验证签名
zh.metaDescription: 验证PDF文档中的数字签名。检查证书有效性、签名者信息和文档完整性。
zh.description:
验证签名工具允许您验证PDF文档中的数字签名。检查签名是否有效，查看证书信息，并确认文档完整性。

上传已签名的PDF，查看所有签名、其有效性状态、签名者信息，以及文档在签名后是否被修改。

所有验证都在浏览器本地进行，您的文档永远不会上传到任何服务器。

howToUse.title: 上传已签名PDF
howToUse.description: 上传包含数字签名的PDF文档。

howToUse.title: 查看结果
howToUse.description: 查看文档中找到的所有签名及其有效性状态。

howToUse.title: 检查详情
howToUse.description: 查看证书信息、签名者详情和签名时间戳。

howToUse.title: 导出报告
howToUse.description: 可选下载验证结果的JSON报告。

useCases.title: 文档验证
useCases.description: 验证签名文档是否真实且未被篡改。

useCases.title: 合规审计
useCases.description: 检查签名有效性以满足合规和审计要求。

useCases.title: 证书审查
useCases.description: 查看已签名文档的证书详情和到期日期。

faq.question: "有效"是什么意思？
faq.answer: 有效签名意味着文档自签名以来未被修改，且证书链完整。

faq.question: 可以验证多个PDF吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以上传多个PDF并批量验证所有签名。

faq.question: 为什么签名可能无效？
faq.answer: 如果文档被修改、证书过期或证书不受信任，签名可能无效。
